chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2062 of 2023 CP D 2064 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on Misc. No.9960/2023 2. For hearing of main case 17.04.2025 Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Syed Danish Qamar, Additional Commissioner LTO Karachi is present. Learned counsel for respondent states under instructions that the impugned demand, subject matter herein, is being withdrawn forthwith subject to the right of the department to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. In view of material representation learned counsel for the petitioner states that petitions appears to have served its purpose, hence, may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. The presence and assistance of officer is appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad
